UserAgent.name: get_exposure_stream
UserAgent.description: Per simulation step: request algorithm recommendations (GetAlgorithmRecomendationEvent), deliver pending @/propagation notifications (MentionEvent), replay keep-following tweets (KeepFollowingEvent), and build social follow feed (SocialRecommendationEvent). Updates last_login_timestamp after social scan.

required_variables.name: current_tweets
required_variables.description: Tweets visible in the current time window (from StartEvent / env.current_tweets).

required_variables.name: mentions
required_variables.description: Pending @/retweet/quote/reply notifications for this user (from env.mention_pool via StartEvent).

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: Followed user IDs for social feed filtering.

required_variables.name: recommended_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Tweet IDs already seen; used to skip duplicates in social feed.

required_variables.name: keep_following_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Tweet IDs to re-expose next round after LLM keep-following decision.

output_updates.name: last_login_timestamp
output_updates.description: Updated after social feed scan (Unix seconds).

UserAgent.name: generate_memory_from_own_tweets
UserAgent.description: Reflect on own tweets published in the current window: generate self-memory via LLM and optionally add supplementary retweets/quotes/replies on own posts (no mention notifications).

required_variables.name: current_tweets
required_variables.description: Current tweet window; filtered to tweets authored by this user.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: May gain new propagation tweets via AddTweetEvent.

UserAgent.name: receive_recommendation
UserAgent.condition: Triggered by SocialRecommendationEvent, AlgorithmRecommendationEvent, SearchResultEvent, or KeepFollowingEvent
UserAgent.description: Consume recommended tweets from social/algorithm/search/keep-following channels; run UserAgentGates + LLM to decide retweets, quotes, replies, @mentions, keep-following, and search; write propagation tweets to content_pool and mention_pool.

required_variables.name: recommendations
required_variables.description: Batch of tweet_id -> tweet dict from the incoming recommendation event.

required_variables.name: recommended_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Historical recommended tweet IDs on profile.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: For mentionable-user resolution.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: For mentionable-user resolution.

required_variables.name: content_pool
required_variables.description: Full tweet pool for chain hints, depth gates, and parent lookup.

required_variables.name: seed_root_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Frozen env seed root tweet IDs for TweetDepthGate hop limits.

output_updates.name: content_pool
output_updates.description: New retweet/quote/reply entries appended as top-level tweet_id keys.

output_updates.name: keep_following_tweet_ids
output_updates.description: At most one tweet ID carried to next round.

UserAgent.name: handle_mention
UserAgent.description: Process @/retweet/quote/reply notifications: LLM decides whether to propagate or search; writes tweets via AddTweetEvent and updates mention_pool; may trigger GetSearchResultEvent.

required_variables.name: mentions
required_variables.description: tweet_id -> {tweet, mention_type} enriched from mention_pool.

required_variables.name: follow_ids
required_variables.description: For relationship hints and @ resolution.

required_variables.name: fan_ids
required_variables.description: For relationship hints and @ resolution.

required_variables.name: content_pool
required_variables.description: Tweet pool for context and depth gates.

required_variables.name: seed_root_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Env seed roots for TweetDepthGate.

output_updates.name: mention_pool
output_updates.description: Processed mentions removed; new notifications added.

Algorithm.name: update_current_tweets
Algorithm.condition: Triggered by StartEvent (recomment_agent_* and search_agent_* only)
Algorithm.description: Sync Algorithm profile current_tweets from StartEvent for random/popularity/interest recommendation and search candidate pools.

required_variables.name: current_tweets
required_variables.description: Current tweet window from StartEvent.

output_updates.name: current_tweets
output_updates.description: Algorithm profile mirror of env current_tweets.

Algorithm.name: send_recommendation_results
Algorithm.description: Run random / popularity / interest recommendation for requesting user; return AlgorithmRecommendationEvent with sampled tweet batch.

required_variables.name: current_tweets
required_variables.description: Candidate tweet pool for this step.

required_variables.name: user_profile
required_variables.description: Requesting UserAgent profile payload.

required_variables.name: recommended_tweet_ids
required_variables.description: Tweets already recommended to this user (dedup input).

required_variables.name: type
required_variables.description: Algorithm type: Random Recommendation | Popularity Recommendation | Interest Recommendation.

required_variables.name: candidate_tweet_ids_by_user
required_variables.description: Interest recommendation per-user candidate lists.

Algorithm.name: send_search_results
Algorithm.description: Run relevant search over current_tweets for the query; return SearchResultEvent.

required_variables.name: current_tweets
required_variables.description: Search corpus.

required_variables.name: user_profile
required_variables.description: Requesting user profile.

required_variables.name: search_keyword
required_variables.description: Keyword from UserAgent LLM decision.

required_variables.name: type
required_variables.description: Search type, e.g. Relevant Search.
